languages.text: "Так мы чтим наших героев. Призыв к Призыву песня прирастает именами. Все началось с сержанта Заркова, первого командира из числа обычных штрафников, в честь которого мы мир и назвали. Величайшая честь — попасть в строки "Гимна" после смерти".

"Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."
languages.original_text: "Так мы чтим наших героев. Призыв к Призыву песня прирастает именами. Все началось с сержанта Заркова, первого командира из числа обычных штрафников, в честь которого мы мир и назвали. Величайшая честь — попасть в строки "Гимна" после смерти".

It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. In his honour, we named this world. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the 'Hymn' after death."

In his honour, we named this world. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the 'Hymn' after death."

We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

languages.text: “我们便是如此纪念我们的英雄。每一轮征召过后，这首歌便多出一行，多出一个名字。最开始是扎尔科夫军士，他是首位当上指挥官的普通判罪征召兵。我们以他的名字命名了这个世界。死后的最高荣耀，就是被写进这首赞歌里。”
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: “我们便是如此纪念我们的英雄。每一轮征召过后，这首歌便多出一行，多出一个名字。最开始是扎尔科夫军士，他是首位当上指挥官的普通判罪征召兵。我们以他的名字命名了这个世界。死后的最高荣耀，就是被写进这首赞歌里。”

languages.text: "Kahramanlarımızı böyle onurlandırıyoruz. Her Sevk Grubu ile şarkı mısra mısra, isim isim büyüyor. Sıradan ceza infaz askerlerinin saflarından yükselen ilk komutan Çavuş Zarkov ile başladı. Bu dünyaya onun adını verdik. En büyük onur, ölümden sonra İlahi'nin satırlarında yer almaktır."
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: "Kahramanlarımızı böyle onurlandırıyoruz. Her Sevk Grubu ile şarkı mısra mısra, isim isim büyüyor. Sıradan ceza infaz askerlerinin saflarından yükselen ilk komutan Çavuş Zarkov ile başladı. Bu dünyaya onun adını verdik. En büyük onur, ölümden sonra İlahi'nin satırlarında yer almaktır."

languages.text: « C'est ainsi que nous honorons la mémoire de nos héros. Le chant s'allonge à chaque Mobilisation, un nom après l'autre. Cette liste a commencé avec le sergent Zarkov, le premier commandant issu des rangs des conscrits pénaux ordinaires. On a donné son nom à ce monde pour lui rendre hommage. Il n'existe pas de plus grand honneur que d'être immortalisé dans les paroles de l'Hymne après la mort. »
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ainsi que nous honorons la mémoire de nos héros. Le chant s'allonge à chaque Mobilisation, un nom après l'autre. Cette liste a commencé avec le sergent Zarkov, le premier commandant issu des rangs des conscrits pénaux ordinaires. On a donné son nom à ce monde pour lui rendre hommage. Il n'existe pas de plus grand honneur que d'être immortalisé dans les paroles de l'Hymne après la mort. »

languages.text: «Es como honramos a nuestros héroes. Con cada llamada, la canción crece. Verso a verso, nombre a nombre. Empezó con el sargento Zarkov, el primer comandante en surgir de entre los reclutas penales comunes. Nombramos este mundo en su honor. El mayor de los halagos es entrar en el Himno al morir».
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: «Es como honramos a nuestros héroes. Con cada llamada, la canción crece. Verso a verso, nombre a nombre. Empezó con el sargento Zarkov, el primer comandante en surgir de entre los reclutas penales comunes. Nombramos este mundo en su honor. El mayor de los halagos es entrar en el Himno al morir».

languages.text: "So ehren wir unsere Helden. Das Lied wächst mit jeder Einberufung, Zeile für Zeile, Name für Name. Es begann mit Sergeant Zarkov, dem ersten Commander, der aus den Reihen der gewöhnlichen Strafrekruten aufstieg. Wir haben diese Welt nach ihm benannt. Nach dem Tod in den Zeilen der Hymne verewigt zu werden, ist die größte aller Ehren."
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: "So ehren wir unsere Helden. Das Lied wächst mit jeder Einberufung, Zeile für Zeile, Name für Name. Es begann mit Sergeant Zarkov, dem ersten Commander, der aus den Reihen der gewöhnlichen Strafrekruten aufstieg. Wir haben diese Welt nach ihm benannt. Nach dem Tod in den Zeilen der Hymne verewigt zu werden, ist die größte aller Ehren."

languages.text: 「こうして我々は英雄を称える。各コールアップごとに、この歌は、一行ずつ、一人ずつ、成長していく。最初の名は、ザルコフ軍曹。普通の人々から選ばれた最初の指揮官だ。この世界は彼の名にちなんで名付けられた。死後、この歌に名を刻まれることは、最大の栄誉である。」
languages.original_text: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."

traits.locale_text: 「こうして我々は英雄を称える。各コールアップごとに、この歌は、一行ずつ、一人ずつ、成長していく。最初の名は、ザルコフ軍曹。普通の人々から選ばれた最初の指揮官だ。この世界は彼の名にちなんで名付けられた。死後、この歌に名を刻まれることは、最大の栄誉である。」
